default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and future improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO metrics show steady growth: 52 published articles, increasing impressions (4,000+) and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [New content strategy launched last week; focus on AI-related topics performing well](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy to be implemented to boost SEO juice for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Potential for leveraging Attention's internal data for unique, high-value content creation](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [52 articles published since October 7th (1 month of content)](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Impressions rising steadily: \~4,000 more over last week](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Weekly clicks growing consistently](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)
  - [AI-related keywords performing particularly well (3-4 articles in top 10)](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Optimizing metadata for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)

### Content Strategy and Improvements

  - [New topic clusters added: sales engagement, management, sales call revenue intelligence, sales automation](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Content gap analysis performed to identify high-relevancy keywords](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Mix of top, middle, and bottom of funnel content planned](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [New V2 refresher workflow implemented:](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [Generates fact-sheet enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
      - [Rewrites original article with new data](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Uses You.com for research (testing against Perplexity and Google)](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Leveraging Internal Data for Content

  - [Potential to use Attention's customer data for unique insights:](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [250+ customers with sales call transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
      - [Salesforce integration for deal size data](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [Possible topics: percentage of sales reps setting next steps, best practices of top performers](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Anonymized data could be used for infographics and LinkedIn content](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

### Image Optimization

  - [Discussed potential for improving article images](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [Currently lower priority due to most traffic coming directly from Google](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)
  - [May revisit for SEO impact in the future](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

### Paid Ad Campaign Integration

  - [Attention to provide top 10 non-branded keywords performing well in paid campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [GrowthX to create content around these keywords for long-term SEO benefit](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement interlinking strategy for new articles](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Create content around call center quality assurance topics](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Optimize metadata for high-impression, low-click articles](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Attention to share top 10 performing non-branded keywords from paid campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [GrowthX to incorporate paid campaign keywords into content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Continue monitoring and optimizing AI-related content performance](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating unique content using Attention's internal data](https://fathom.video/share/_-cmdTQjRy_LH5wwMDfmsS9BrMExUnQa?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

action_items.description: Create interlinking tab in Airtable for new articles; track URLs linking to/from each
Optimize high-impression/low-click articles w/ new SEO titles + meta descriptions
Share insights from head of sales re: interesting product data for content (SQL query results)
Provide top 10 non-branded keywords performing well in paid ad campaigns
